_meta.voice: Direct American English. 'You / your shop / your crew' voice. US number format ($3,500). En-dash for ranges (4–10 weeks). No hype. Construction terminology: renovation contractor, GC, remodel, gut renovation, fit-out, foreman, estimator, trades. Danish SEO phrases preserved as-is.
_meta.notes: Sibling of industryPage.medicine. Mirrors its structural patterns: hero / 3-reasons / case study / solution-architecture / services / comparison / pricing / FAQ / audit-offer. Some strings overlap word-for-word with medicine (Telegram, Bitrix24, etc.) — translations match medicine's where applicable.

strings.**Результат:** заявки 3–5 на місяць, з т: **Result:** 3–5 inquiries per month, only the ones who call.
strings.*SEO-аудит*: топ-50 ключових запитів ваш: *SEO audit*: top 50 keyword queries in your region
strings.3 причини, чому клієнти\n*не записуються:
3 reasons clients
*don't book* through your site
strings.Online-калькулятор з *4 типами* дахів і: Online calculator with *4 roof types* and price per m²
strings.SMS-нагадування за 24 і 1 годину: SMS reminders 24 hours and 1 hour out
strings.Sanity CMS для самостійних правок *без р: Sanity CMS for self-serve edits *without a developer*
strings.Адмінка через старий CMS — будь-яка змін: Admin runs on an old CMS — every change needs a *developer*
strings.Базовий лендинг\nремонтної компанії:
Starter landing page
for a renovation contractor
No strings attached. No upsell. Useful even if you end up working with someone else.
strings.Безкоштовний аудит сайту вашої ремонтної: Free audit of your renovation-contractor website
strings.Будівельна компанія *NBYG* з Копенгагена: Copenhagen contractor *NBYG* came to us with the usual problem: a business-card site on a legacy CMS that wasn't bringing in inquiries and wasn't ranking for local queries. The brief: rebuild the structure around services, add a calculator, and get to the top of Google for "*nyt tag København*."
strings.Воронка від кліку до підписаного договор: Funnel from first click to signed contract
strings.За **6 місяців** після запуску NBYG отри: **Six months** after launch, NBYG saw *6× organic traffic* and a steady stream of inquiries from the calculator form. That's a typical outcome of rebuilding a renovation-contractor site — going from a "*business card that doesn't book anyone*" to a tool that actually brings clients in through organic search.
strings.Загальний сайт без окремих лендингів *пі: Catch-all site with no dedicated landing pages *per service*
Send us your current site URL. We'll deliver the report as a PDF within *3 business days*.
strings.Замовлення тільки через дзвінок або emai: Inquiries only by phone or email
strings.Заявка з калькулятора або форми попадає: Inquiries from the calculator or contact form land in your *CRM* the moment they're submitted. The foreman gets a Telegram alert. The client gets an SMS confirming the estimator's visit. No leads lost to spam folders.
strings.Зменшує дзвінки прорабу на *40%*: Cuts calls to the foreman by *40%*
strings.Календар *вільних слотів* майстра: Calendar of the *available slots* for each crew
strings.Калькулятор як *головний* інструмент про: The calculator as the *primary* sales tool
strings.Кастомні сайти для ремонтних і будівельн: Custom websites for renovation and construction contractors: price calculator, *before / after* gallery, local SEO. Live in 4–6 weeks, 1-year warranty.
Custom websites for renovation and construction contractors: price calculator, before / after gallery, local SEO. Live in 4–6 weeks, 1-year warranty.
strings.Клієнт за *60 секунд* отримує оцінку «ві: In *60 seconds* the client gets an estimate like "from $30/sq ft"

strings.Не надсилаємо нічого, окрім звіту і одно: We send the report and one follow-up with examples of our work. No spam.
strings.Не просто «*красивий сайт*». Інструменти: Not just a "*pretty site*." Tools that actually move the inquiry pipeline — SEO-ready structure, price calculator, client portal.
strings.Не ранжувався в Google по «*nyt tag Købe: Wasn't ranking on Google for "*nyt tag København*"

Pro site

strings.Структура під «ремонт + район» замість з: "Renovation + neighborhood" structure instead of a catch-all
strings.У клієнта було два сегменти: *приватники: The client had two segments: *homeowners* (apartments, houses) and *B2B* (developers, HOAs, offices). Splitting them into two sites would've been cheaper upfront, but it would've fragmented SEO and doubled long-term support cost.
strings.Хочете **такий самий результат**? Подиві: Want **the same kind of result**? See how we do it.
strings.Це 3 найпоширеніші. На ваш конкретний са: These are the 3 most common. Your specific site probably has *5–7*. The free audit will show yours.

. 70% of leads drop off at "call us for pricing."
A services page with stock-photo art. Not a single real project with an address. Clients think "do you actually do renovations, or are you a
?" Without real cases, there's no trust.
A catch-all "all renovation types" page with no breakdown by neighborhood or work type. Competitors with landing pages like "
" pick up all the local traffic.
